zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter II Corbucion於1140年出生在英國斯塔福爾林頓 霍爾時，他的父親Peter Corbucion I26歲，母親Charlecote of Egmanton21歲。他於大約1158年與Margaret Gifford在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1200年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯圖德利享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter II Corbucion was born in 1140, in Chillington Hall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Peter Corbucion I, was 26 and his mother, Charlecote of Egmanton, was 21. He married Margaret Gifford about 1158, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1200, in Studley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter II Corbucion est né en 1140, à Chillington Hall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Corbucion I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Charlecote of Egmanton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gifford environ 1158, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1200, à Studley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Er hat um 1158 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Gifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Lui sposato Margaret Gifford circa 1158, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Peter II Corbucionが1140年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチリントン ハルで生まれた時，父Peter Corbucion Iは26歳，母Charlecote of Egmantonは21歳であった。約1158年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでMargaret Giffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1200年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストゥドリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter II Corbucion(이)가 1140년 영국 스태퍼드실르 치링턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Corbucion I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Charlecote of Egmanton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Margaret Gifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스투들리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter II Corbucion nasceu em 1140, em Chillington Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Corbucion I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Charlecote of Egmanton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gifford aproximadamente 1158, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter II Corbucion родился в 1140 г. в местности чиллингтон холл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Corbucion I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Charlecote of Egmanton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gifford около 1158 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1200 г. в местности студли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Gifford aproximadamente 1158, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
